category_sources: Official sed.sourceforge.io super-sed page describes ssed as a heavily enhanced version of sed.
source_facts.description says Super sed stream editor.
display_name_sources: Official super-sed page and package executable use ssed.
docs_sources: Official sed.sourceforge.io super-sed page is the best official documentation/download surface found.
source_facts.homepage points to a Debian package page, which was not used as official documentation.
repo_sources: Official super-sed page provides source tarball downloads but no official source-control project URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official super-sed page describes it as an enhanced sed implementation.
source_facts.description identifies it as Super sed stream editor.
